title: Increase text side in Gantt chart view
excerpt: We have multi-year roadmaps that we build out using the Gantt chart functionality. Typically, we download them to PDF and insert into PowerPoint. For multi-year views, the text next to bars is very small and blurry. We a…

posts.author: mollymcauliffe (Molly McAuliffe)
posts.cookedHtml: We have multi-year roadmaps that we build out using the Gantt chart functionality. Typically, we download them to PDF and insert into PowerPoint. For multi-year views, the text next to bars is very small and blurry. We are looking to edit text size to be larger to read better.
